Home › Seminole County › Lowest Health Scores

Restaurants With the Lowest Health Scores in Seminole County

No sugar-coating it: these 9 Seminole County restaurants scored a D or F at their most recent Florida health inspection, AGAVE AZUL COCINA MEXICANA lowest of all at 42/100. The state records the violations; we just rank them, worst first.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • F 42 A
    AGAVE AZUL COCINA MEXICANA Mexican ★ 4.8 (6813) Winter Springs · Seminole County VeganVeg +6 more Violations: 6 high-priority, 1 intermediate, 7 basic Inspected May 2026
  • F 43 B
    BREAKFAST CLUB OVIEDO Other ★ 4.3 (973) Oviedo · Seminole County Violations: 4 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 13 basic Inspected Feb 2026
  • F 50 H
    HABANEROS MEXICAN GRILL #5 Mexican ★ 4.4 (1815) Oviedo · Seminole County VeganVeg +4 more Violations: 4 high-priority, 3 intermediate, 9 basic Inspected May 2026
  • F 59 F
    FIG'S PRIME Steak ★ 4.5 (984) Altamonte Springs · Seminole County GFDF +3 more Violations: 2 high-priority, 5 intermediate, 10 basic Inspected Jun 2026
  • D 60 M
    METRO DINER American ★ 4.6 (2947) Casselberry · Seminole County VeganVeg +1 more Violations: 3 high-priority, 1 intermediate, 13 basic Inspected Feb 2026
  • D 66 R
    ROCKS AND BREWS American ★ 4.4 (3722) Oviedo · Seminole County VeganVeg +3 more Violations: 2 high-priority, 2 intermediate, 12 basic Inspected May 2026
  • D 68 B
    BONEFISH GRILL American ★ 4.5 (2436) Longwood · Seminole County GFDF +5 more Violations: 1 high-priority, 2 intermediate, 8 basic Inspected Mar 2026
  • D 69 B
    BUFFALO WILD WINGS 556 Other ★ 3.6 (2371) Sanford · Seminole County Keto Violations: 1 high-priority, 5 intermediate, 8 basic Inspected Jan 2026
  • D 69 M
    METRO DINER American ★ 4.8 (3986) Oviedo · Seminole County VeganVeg +1 more Violations: 2 high-priority, 3 intermediate, 6 basic Inspected Mar 2026
